com.android.device.configuration

类 PropertyGroup

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup
  • 直接已知子类:
    AutoScan, ClipboardWedge, DecodingNotification, Digimarc, DisplayNotification, Formatting, FrameCaptureConfiguration, GoodRead, IntentWedge, Inverse, KeyboardWedge, KeyboardWedgeExternal, LinearQuietZones, MultiScan, ScannerOptions, ScannerProperties, SymbologyBase, UpcEanExtensions

    public class PropertyGroup
extends java.lang.Object
    PropertyGroup contains properties and/or other property groups.

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      protected java.util.ArrayList<PropertyGroup> _groupList 
      protected java.util.ArrayList<Property> _list 

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      限定符 构造器和说明
      protected PropertyGroup()
      This is an empty constructor, in the implementation MUST be implemented.

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      java.util.ArrayList<PropertyGroup> getGroups()
      Returns the property groups contained by this group.
      java.util.ArrayList<Property> getProperties()
      Returns the properties contained by this group.
      boolean isFullySupported()
      Tells if this property group is completely supported by the underling decoding hardware.
      boolean isSupported()
      Tells if this property group is supported by the underling decoding hardware.
      int load(PropertyGetter from)
      Load the properties values contained by this property from the PropertyGetter.
      int store(PropertyEditor to, boolean persist)
      Store the properties values contained by this property into the PropertyEditor.

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 字段详细资料

      • _groupList

        protected java.util.ArrayList<PropertyGroup> _groupList

      • _list

        protected java.util.ArrayList<Property> _list

    • 构造器详细资料

      • PropertyGroup

        protected PropertyGroup()
        This is an empty constructor, in the implementation MUST be implemented.

    • 方法详细资料

      • load

        public int load(PropertyGetter from)
        Load the properties values contained by this property from the PropertyGetter.
        参数:
        from - The PropertyGetter called to synchronize the current values.
        返回:
        int ConfigException.SUCCESS in case of success, otherwise a possible error code, matching one of the ConfigException error constants.
        抛出:
        ConfigException - in case of error, when exceptions are enabled through the ErrorManager singleton.

      • store

        public int store(PropertyEditor to,
                 boolean persist)
        Store the properties values contained by this property into the PropertyEditor.
        参数:
        to - The PropertyEditor in charge of applying the desired values.
        persist - boolean if true the configuration is saved in a persistent way across system reboots.
        返回:
        int ConfigException.SUCCESS in case of success, otherwise a possible error code, matching one of the ConfigException error constants.
        抛出:
        ConfigException - in case of error, when exceptions are enabled through the ErrorManager singleton.

      • isSupported

        public boolean isSupported()
        Tells if this property group is supported by the underling decoding hardware.
        返回:
        true if at least one contained property is supported by the underling decoding hardware.
        If this property group doesn't contain any property, this method returns false.

      • isFullySupported

        public boolean isFullySupported()
        Tells if this property group is completely supported by the underling decoding hardware.
        返回:
        true if all contained property are supported by the underling decoding hardware.
        If this property group doesn't contain any property, this method returns false.

      • getProperties

        public java.util.ArrayList<Property> getProperties()
        Returns the properties contained by this group.
        返回:
        the properties in as ArrayList.
        It is null if there are no properties in this group.

      • getGroups

        public java.util.ArrayList<PropertyGroup> getGroups()
        Returns the property groups contained by this group.
        返回:
        the property groups in as ArrayList.
        It is null if there are no other property groups in this group.
